name: G. Lorimer Moseley
bio: Australian pain neuroscientist and physiotherapist; Professor of Professional Neurosciences at University of South Australia.

name: David S. Butler
bio: Australian physiotherapist and educator; co-founder of NOI Group, specialising in neurodynamics and pain education.

name: Adriaan Louw
bio: South African-born US physical therapist; leading researcher in pain neuroscience education (PNE).

name: Bahrbahra A. Boyt Schell
bio: Occupational Therapy educator and scholar; Professor Emerita, Brenau University; editor of Willard and Spackman's Occupational Therapy.

name: Mary Law
bio: Canadian occupational therapist; Professor at McMaster University; lead developer of the goal measure.

name: Sonoko Sakai
bio: Japanese-born US cooking teacher and author; cookbook author specialising in traditional Japanese home cooking.

name: Robin Ha
bio: Korean-American cartoonist and cookbook author; author of Cook Korean! and Korean Cooking Uncovered.

name: Bill Schneider
bio: Montana-based outdoor writer; author of dozens of hiking guides for the Rocky Mountain region.

name: Jon Krakauer
bio: American writer and mountaineer; contributing editor to Outside magazine; author of Into the Wild and Into Thin Air.

name: Matthew Walker
bio: British neuroscientist and sleep researcher; Professor of Neuroscience and Psychology at UC Berkeley.

name: James Clear
bio: American author and speaker on habits and performance; author of Atomic Habits.

name: Bessel van der Kolk
bio: Dutch-American psychiatrist specialising in trauma and PTSD; founder of the Trauma Center in Boston.

name: Loretta Heuer
bio: Occupational Therapist and professional educator; author of hand splinting and upper extremity rehabilitation texts.
top_work: Splinting the Hand and Upper Extremity

name: Ann Wilcock
bio: Australian occupational therapist; Professor Emerita, Deakin University; foundational theorist of occupational science.

name: Hilary Doidge
bio: Montana-based wilderness guide and hiking author; regional contributor to FalconGuides series.
top_work: Hiking the Bob Marshall Wilderness Complex

name: Hank Tran
bio: Montana conservationist and author; wrote extensively about Montana's wilderness areas and wildlife.

name: Ronald Melzack
bio: Canadian psychologist; co-developer (with Patrick Wall) of gate control theory of pain; created the McGill Pain Questionnaire.

name: Peter Wall
bio: Pain researcher and coach; investigator in central sensitization and neuromodulation.
top_work: Pain: The Science and Culture of Why We Hurt

name: Steven C. Hayes
bio: American psychologist; developer of Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT); Professor at University of Nevada, Reno.

name: Glen Gillen
bio: Columbia University Occupational Therapy faculty; professional researcher in stroke rehabilitation and hand function.
